title: Shirgaon Fort
tagline: Shirgaon Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shirgaon Fort / Shirgao Fort (Marathi: शिरगाव किल्ला) is a fort located 6.5 km from Palghar, in Palghar district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Shirgaon Fort / Shirgao Fort (Marathi: शिरगाव किल्ला) is a fort located 6.5 km from Palghar, in Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is in very good condition. The outer walls, steps, parapets, bastions etc. in solid masonry are in excellent order and worth seeing.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Satpati
topPlaces.description: Satpati is a fishing village on the western coast of India, about 80 km north of Mumbai in the Palghar Taluka of District Palghar in Maharashtra. The main occupation in Satpati is fishing, with large exports abroad.

topPlaces.name: Palghar
topPlaces.description: Palghar () is a prominent town in the Konkan division of Maharashtra state, India, and a municipal council. It is strategically located within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and has been the administrative capital of the Palghar district since 2014.

topPlaces.name: Umroli
topPlaces.description: Umroli is a town in Maharashtra. It also has a railway station on the western Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway.

topPlaces.name: Kelve Fort
topPlaces.description: Kelve Fort, or Kelva Fort (Marathi: केळवे किल्ला), is a fort in the Thane district of Maharashtra, located 12.5 km from Palghar. This fort is amidst the Casuarina plantation on the Kelwa Beach.

topPlaces.name: Kelwa
topPlaces.description: Kelwa or Kelve is a town in Maharashtra, India. It is served by the Kelve Road railway station on the Western line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway which extends from Churchgate to Dahanu Road.

topPlaces.name: Kelwa Beach
topPlaces.description: Kelwa Beach, also known as Kelva or Kelwe Beach, is a beach in Maharashtra, India. It is a popular weekend getaway for tourists from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Saravali, Dahanu
topPlaces.description: Saravali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Dahanu taluka.

items.note: Satpati is a fishing village on the western coast of India, about 80 km north of Mumbai in the Palghar Taluka of District Palghar in Maharashtra. The main occupation in Satpati is fishing, with large exports abroad.

Palghar () is a prominent town in the Konkan division of Maharashtra state, India, and a municipal council. It is strategically located within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and has been the administrative capital of the Palghar district since 2014.
Umroli is a town in Maharashtra. It also has a railway station on the western Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway.
Kelve Fort, or Kelva Fort (Marathi: केळवे किल्ला), is a fort in the Thane district of Maharashtra, located 12.5 km from Palghar. This fort is amidst the Casuarina plantation on the Kelwa Beach.
Kelwa or Kelve is a town in Maharashtra, India. It is served by the Kelve Road railway station on the Western line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway which extends from Churchgate to Dahanu Road.
Kelwa Beach, also known as Kelva or Kelwe Beach, is a beach in Maharashtra, India. It is a popular weekend getaway for tourists from Mumbai.
Saravali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Dahanu taluka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shirgaon Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shirgaon Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shirgaon Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shirgaon Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shirgaon Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shirgaon Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Shirgaon Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shirgaon Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Satpati, Palghar, Umroli, Kelve Fort, Kelwa.
